name: ThirdEye RakNet Runtime
author: 85457381+DJStompZone@users.noreply.github.com
description: Builds ThirdEye with npm run build, copies only the generated build directory into the server, installs production dependencies from inside that build directory, and runs Run.sh.
startup: cd /home/container && if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then bash ./Install_NodeJS_Modules.sh; fi; bash ./Run.sh

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

apt-get update
apt-get install -y ca-certificates git

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /tmp

rm -rf thirdeye-src
git clone --depth 1 --branch "${BRANCH}" "${GIT_ADDRESS}" thirdeye-src

cd thirdeye-src

if [[ -f package-lock.json || -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]]; then
    npm ci || npm install
else
    npm install
fi

npm run build

if [[ ! -f build/Install_NodeJS_Modules.sh ]]; then
    cat > build/Install_NodeJS_Modules.sh <<'THIRDEYE_INSTALL_EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

script_dir="$(CDPATH= cd -- "$(dirname -- "$0")" && pwd)"
cd "$script_dir"

if [[ -f package-lock.json || -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]]; then
    npm ci --omit=dev || npm install --omit=dev
else
    npm install --omit=dev
fi
THIRDEYE_INSTALL_EOF
fi

if [[ ! -f build/Run.sh ]]; then
    cat > build/Run.sh <<'THIRDEYE_RUN_EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

script_dir="$(CDPATH= cd -- "$(dirname -- "$0")" && pwd)"
cd "$script_dir"

if [[ ! -d node_modules ]]; then
    bash ./Install_NodeJS_Modules.sh
fi

if node -e "const p = require('./package.json'); process.exit(p.scripts && p.scripts.start ? 0 : 1)" 2>/dev/null; then
    exec npm start
fi

exec node "${MAIN_FILE:-index.js}"
THIRDEYE_RUN_EOF
fi

rm -rf /mnt/server/*
cp -R build/. /mnt/server/

cd /mnt/server
bash ./Install_NodeJS_Modules.sh
npm cache clean --force

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Git repository to clone and build.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch, tag, or ref to build.
